title: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
summary: While wearing these gloves, climbing and swimming don’t cost you extra movement, and you gain a +5 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb or swim.

contentBlocks.text: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing Wondrous item, uncommon (requires attunement)
While wearing these gloves, climbing and swimming don’t cost you extra movement, and you gain a +5 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb or swim.
